name: Pentatonic Memory
description: Persistent, searchable memory with multi-signal retrieval and HyDE query expansion. Stores every conversation turn, injects relevant memories before each prompt, and consolidates knowledge over time.

llm_url.description: OpenAI-compatible chat endpoint for HyDE (default: http://localhost:11435/v1)

llm_model.description: Chat model name for HyDE query expansion (default: llama3.2:3b)

client_id.description: Client ID for memory scoping (default: default)

search_limit.description: Max memories to inject per prompt (default: 5)

tes_endpoint.description: TES API endpoint for hosted mode (omit for local mode)

tes_api_key.description: TES API key for hosted mode (omit for local mode)

tes_client_id.description: TES client ID for hosted mode (omit for local mode)
